"scrollable-vertical": true, "children": [{"text": "Welcome to Awoken - The Lucid Dreaming Tool!

You now have 3 days ad-free to check out the app, no strings attached. Everything will still keep working after the 3 days.

The Premium Upgrade unlocks Dark Theme, the Dream Patterns module and Speech-To-Text assistance in the Dream Journal. Upgrading can be done in the info tab to the right.

Don't forget that you can now synchronize your journal entries to the cloud if you want to have backups.

Inspect the features, learn, explore, discover. And start dreaming for real.

Good luck!
